results.title: The Virtual QE Engineer: Building a Super-Agent to Orchestrate the Future of Test Automation | by Prashant Kumar | Medium
results.content: # The Virtual QE Engineer: Building a Super-Agent to Orchestrate the Future of Test Automation. For decades, Quality Engineering (QE) has been a discipline of specialists. API testers, UI automation engineers, performance gurus, and mobile experts — each working in their own silo with their own specialized tools. This fragmentation, while necessary for depth, often creates bottlenecks, coverage gaps, and a frustrating lack of cohesion in understanding the overall health of a product. But what [...] The Virtual QE Engineer: Building a Super-Agent to Orchestrate the Future of Test Automation | by Prashant Kumar | Medium [...] a product. But what if we could consolidate this distributed expertise? What if we had a single, intelligent entity that could not only write and execute tests across all domains but also orchestrate, adapt, and reason like a seasoned human QE engineer? Welcome to the era of the Virtual QE Engineer (VQE). Powered by LangChain, multi-agent orchestration frameworks, and generative AI, this isn’t just another automation tool. It’s a super-agent designed to act as an autonomous, full-stack quality

You'll be instrumental in broadening test coverage, enhancing test reliability, and nurturing a culture of ownership within our team, particularly within the automation domain.  Work hands-on with mobile automation using Appium and WebDriverIO.  Debug, fix, and stabilize existing automated tests.  Integrate automated tests seamlessly into CI/CD pipelines (GitHub) to facilitate continuous testing.  Monitor [...] testing.  Monitor test results in Sentry, swiftly identifying issues and collaborating with the development team to resolve them.  Cultivate a culture of ownership in QA automation, fostering continuous improvement across the team.  7+ years of overall QA experience, including at least 5 years in mobile-focused QA automation.  Strong hands-on experience with Appium and WebDriverIO.  Solid experience with TypeScript for writing automated tests.  Experience with mobile app deployment via App [...] ## GT working model:. You will work directly with a client through our Extended Team model. You work with the same tools and technologies as they do and are managed directly by the client without any intermediary in between. We help you build relationships and create an environment where you genuinely feel like a member of the client’s team. We also encourage trips to a client and join teambuilding and after-work activities.
